---
title: "TabPFN Practitioner"
subtitle: "Rendered notebooks for gradient boosting practitioners"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: "*.ipynb"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description, reading-time]
  sort: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  table-striped: false
  table-hover: true
---

::: {.site-hero}
Practical TabPFN notes for readers who already know boosted trees and want a sharper feel for missing values, categorical inputs, parameters, and counterfactual checks.
:::

The notebooks are rendered as committed. Saved outputs are used as the display layer, with no runtime Python, model weights, backend, or browser recompute.

Start from the sidebar for the authored order. New notebooks are added to navigation during render when their front matter follows the [content contract](site-contract.qmd).

## Notebook Index
